title: dolichos catjang
intro: Dolichos catjang, also known as Horse Gram, is a type of legume plant belonging to the Dolichos genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Dolichos catjang include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, regulate blood sugar, and even aid in weight management. In herbal preparations, Dolichos catjang is often used in the form of powder or decoction, and can be consumed as a supplement or added to food dishes for its nutritional and medicinal benefits.
